name: 𑣲The Bros [BLOCKY, PEN, ERASER, SNOWBALL]
description:
֯ ♡Stuck in an Elevator With Four Randos… ♡ ֯

Surely this must be seven minutes (or hours) in Heaven for some, RIGHT!?

Important Note

This is my first attempt at making a Janitor AI bot with multiple characters baked into it.

This contains 4 characters, Blocky, Pen, Eraser and Snowball from Battle for Dream Island, in an AU where BFDI is an actual reality show, where they only participated in season 1, all four of the characters are humanized. See the bot’s “personality” segment if you want to get a rough understanding on what all of them look like. I might replace the image with a more fitting image soon idk.
creator: ScarfiTheOne
